settings.subtitle: Magnetic by intention. Your scent enters the room a heartbeat before you do — and stays in the conversation long after.

settings.content: You do not chase. You are the centre of gravity in a room that didn't know it was looking.
Velvet, low light, the slow draw of a line. You are felt in the space between glances.

settings.label: Read more
settings.content: The Seducer wears fragrance the way it was meant to be worn — quietly powerful, deliberately laid. Think low-cut amber, dark florals, animalic warmth, a hint of musk that asks the question without answering it. Notes that lean closer rather than announce. This is not perfume to please; it is presence.

settings.title: The | Seducer's | companions
settings.subtitle: Notes that mirror your gravity — close, intentional, kept.

settings.title: Share your scent archetype with your friends!
settings.body: Let your circle find their olfactory match — the discovery is more interesting when it's compared.
